2605.30202.title: A Dual-Path Architecture for Scaling Compute and Capacity in LLMs
2605.30202.paper_summary: Looped transformers apply a shared block multiple times and have emerged as a parameter-efficient route to scaling compute in language models. However, at fixed FLOPs a looped model has strictly less capacity than a baseline transformer. We propose a novel dual-path block that can flexibly scale compute, the number of sequential operations applied to a hidden state, and capacity, the parameters available at a single step. For this we expose both axes as parallel pathways within a single layer: a deep sublayer re-applied K times with shared parameters, and a wide sublayer with an enlarged feed-forward network applied once. Independent per-token gates combine both axes and allow detailed per-token routing analyses. We show that across two FLOP budgets, our dual-path model surpasses iso-FLOP matched models on language modeling and downstream evaluations, while using fewer parameters than the baseline at matched FLOPs. The learned gates are directly interpretable and show systematic per-token allocation with function words and lexical content trend wide, while punctuation, symbols, and arithmetic tokens trend deep.
2605.30202.paper_summary_zh: 循環Transformer多次應用共享區塊，並已成為在語言模型中擴展計算的參數高效路徑。<lb/>然而，在固定的FLOPs下，循環模型的容量嚴格低於基準Transformer。<lb/>我們提出了一種新穎的雙路徑區塊，可以靈活地擴展計算、應用於隱藏狀態的序列操作數以及容量，即在單一步驟中可用的參數。<lb/>為此，我們將這兩個軸暴露為單層內的平行通道：一個深層子層重複應用K次，並共享參數，另一個寬層子層則擴大前饋網絡並應用一次。<lb/>獨立的每個標記閘門結合了這兩個軸，並允許詳細的每個標記路由分析。<lb/>我們展示了在兩個FLOP預算下，我們的雙路徑模型在語言建模和下游評估中超越了等FLOP匹配模型，同時在匹配FLOPs下使用的參數少於基準。<lb/>學習到的閘門是直接可解釋的，並顯示出系統的每個標記分配，功能詞和詞彙內容的趨勢較寬，而標點符號、符號和算術標記的趨勢較深。
2605.30202.author: Markus Frey et.al.
2605.30202.authors: Markus Frey, Behzad Shomali, Joachim Koehler, Mehdi Ali
